rationale: No qualitative change affecting Poland directly; Iran deal remains unresolved with conflicting signals, marginally relevant via energy prices; all other headlines are distant or irrelevant.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal: signing claimed by Trump, disputed by Tehran
top_events.summary: If a deal is signed, oil/gas prices could ease, indirectly benefiting Polish energy costs. But conflicting signals mean no confirmed change yet.

top_events.title: UK forces seize suspected Russian shadow fleet tanker in English Channel
top_events.summary: A new enforcement action against Russia's shadow fleet is a mild positive signal for Poland — it tightens pressure on Russia's oil revenues and sanctions evasion near NATO waters.

top_events.title: Israel attacks Beirut amid Iran deal uncertainty
top_events.summary: Israeli strikes on Beirut on the same day a US-Iran deal was expected add instability to the Middle East, keeping energy market uncertainty elevated for Poland.
